title: ochrosia coccinea
intro: Ochrosia coccinea, also known as the coral tree, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the Pacific Islands, specifically the islands of Tahiti and the Society Islands. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia coccinea include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and providing antioxidant protection, with herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures being commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
